title: dalea mixteca
intro: Dalea mixteca, also known as the Mixteco or Mexican feathergrass, is a perennial plant species native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and it has been used to treat ailments such as bronchitis and coughs. In terms of herbal preparations, Dalea mixteca can be consumed as a tea, and its leaves and stems can be dried and used in infusions or made into a poultice for topical application.
